seoTitle: Durham Downs vs Durong — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Durham Downs and Durong. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Durham Downs vs Durong: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Durham Downs and Durong.
heading: Durham Downs vs Durong — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Durham Downs, Queensland and Durong, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Durham Downs has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Durong (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Durham Downs or Durong safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Durham Downs has a flood risk score of 44/100, while Durong scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Durham Downs scores 40/100 for bushfire risk. Durong scores 49/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Durham Downs or Durong?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Durham Downs has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
